examples: Is there a discotheque in this town?
One evening, she made a rare outing to the local discotheque.
There is also a discotheque and garage for Poonawalla's favorite toys--sports cars and custom-built limousines.
For the past month, strange electrical fluctuations in our sitting room have turned it into a discotheque.
The Libyans had been accused of the bombing of a West Berlin discotheque in which two American GIs were killed.
